svg.title: Classic slot symbols in neon signage style, second refinement
svg.desc: Cherry with two S-curve stems from a single top anchor, Bar in cyan frame with blood red text, Bell, Lime, Watermelon with seeds pulled fully inside red flesh, Horseshoe with nails aligned to the path centerline, Diamond without the dissonant white highlight, and Clover with four heart leaves rotated to diagonal NE SE SW NW positions
